task_completion.description: Create the 'Waste Generated (kg)' data element with correct properties
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the DHIS2 Maintenance app showing the creation or existence of a data element named 'Waste Generated (kg)' with Short name 'Waste Gen', Domain Type 'Aggregate', Value Type 'Number', and Aggregation Type 'Sum'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Waste Incinerated (kg)' data element with correct properties
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the DHIS2 Maintenance app showing the creation or existence of a data element named 'Waste Incinerated (kg)' with Short name 'Waste Incin', Domain Type 'Aggregate', Value Type 'Number', and Aggregation Type 'Sum'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Hospital Waste Management' dataset and assign data elements
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Dataset configuration screen showing the name 'Hospital Waste Management', Period type 'Monthly', and both 'Waste Generated (kg)' and 'Waste Incinerated (kg)' selected in the data elements list.

task_completion.description: Assign the dataset to 'Bo District' and its sub-units
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Organization Units tab in the Dataset configuration screen with 'Bo District' and its sub-units checked/selected.

task_completion.description: Record the waste data for Bo Government Hospital for January 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the DHIS2 Data Entry app showing Organization Unit 'Bo Government Hospital', Period 'January 2024', and Dataset 'Hospital Waste Management'. The value '150' should be entered for 'Waste Generated (kg)' and '120' for 'Waste Incinerated (kg)'.
Look for the 'Complete' button being clicked or a 'Completed' status indicator/check mark at the bottom of the Data Entry screen for the entered dataset.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the DHIS2 graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard DHIS2 web interface (Maintenance app, Data Entry app) rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify interaction with the actual DHIS2 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should reflect a DHIS2 instance, and the UI elements (menus, buttons, forms) should match the standard DHIS2 layout, not a text editor or static HTML mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake success messages
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer console (Inspect Element) is not open and being used to alter the DOM to artificially display 'Completed' statuses or fake data element lists.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring DHIS2. Data elements to verify: 'Waste Generated (kg)' and 'Waste Incinerated (kg)'. Both must have Value Type: NUMBER, Aggregation Type: Sum, and Domain Type: Aggregate. The dataset must be named 'Hospital Waste Management' with Period Type: Monthly. The target organization unit for data entry is 'Bo Government Hospital' (a real facility in Sierra Leone). The target period is January 2024 (format 202401). The expected values are exactly 150 for Waste Generated and 120 for Waste Incinerated.
